macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Stock Futures Decline on Iran Conflict Concerns
items.summary: US stock futures fell amid escalating tensions in Iran after a negative response to a US peace plan and Gulf states' condemnation of attacks on energy infrastructure. Oil prices surged with Brent crude up 3.9% to $106.2 and WTI up 3.61% to $93.58.

items.title: Major Indices Close Higher on March 26 Despite Geopolitical Risks
items.summary: The Dow Jones rose 0.7% to 46,429.49, Nasdaq advanced 0.8% to 21,929.83, and S&P 500 gained 0.5% to 6,591.90, led by gains in Materials, Health Care, and Consumer Discretionary sectors. Super Micro Computer shares surged 8.2% as the top S&P 500 gainer.

items.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500, and Russell 2000 Drop Over 1% Mid-Session on ECB Comments and Iran Tensions
items.summary: Past midday on March 26, the Nasdaq fell 1.57%, Russell 2000 dropped 1.24%, and S&P 500 declined 1.15% following ECB remarks amid ongoing Iran war concerns. Markets had rallied earlier on hopes of an Iran deal.

items.title: Markets Reprice Middle East Risk Premium as VIX Eases
items.summary: The CBOE Volatility Index dropped 6% to 25.33 while trading volume was lower at 17.07 billion shares; S&P 500 saw more new lows than highs amid Middle East tensions. Progress toward an Iran peace deal could limit oil's upward pressure.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Better Home & Finance and Coinbase Launch Crypto-Backed Mortgages
items.summary: Better Home & Finance and Coinbase announced a partnership to offer mortgages backed by Bitcoin and USDC as collateral for down payments, rolling out in the next three months and compliant with Fannie Mae guidelines for lower interest rates.

items.title: SEC Advances New Regulations for Cryptocurrency
items.summary: The SEC is moving forward with new regulations for crypto, as reported from the Digital Asset Summit, with implications for consumers and the industry.

items.title: MARA Stock Rises 6% Despite Bitcoin Falling 2.83% to Under $69,400
items.summary: Marathon Digital (MARA) shares surged 6% amid a Bitcoin price drop, driven by the company's diversification into AI and high-performance computing via acquisitions and joint ventures.

items.title: FBI Reports Soaring Crypto Crime Including Scams
items.summary: The FBI highlighted a surge in cryptocurrency crimes such as investment and romance scams, noting challenges in tracking fast-moving digital funds.

items.title: Analyst Predicts Bitcoin's 'Final Discount' Phase Ending Soon
items.summary: A Bitcoin analyst suggests the cryptocurrency is entering its final discount phase, with a key buying window potentially between October 6-16, 2026.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: INSAIT Releases BgGPT 3.0 with Precision AI Models for Business
items.summary: INSAIT unveiled BgGPT 3.0 on March 26, 2026, featuring image and voice recognition, document processing, and internet search, available as a mobile app. They also released underlying models in 4B, 12B, and 27B sizes, optimized for Bulgarian and English, outperforming much larger models in Bulgarian tasks.[6]

items.title: Salesforce AI Research Predicts Key Agentic AI Trends Through 2027
items.summary: Salesforce identified simulation environments like eVerse, agent-to-agent ecosystems, and ambient intelligence as major trends shaping enterprise AI. They launched AI Foundry to advance system-level AI focusing on consistency, accuracy, and trust.[3]

items.title: FDA's Elsa AI Assistant Faces Sudden Model Migration from Claude to Gemini
items.summary: The FDA's generative AI tool Elsa is undergoing a rapid, politically-mandated switch from Anthropic's Claude to Google's Gemini due to national security concerns with Anthropic, raising technical, compliance, and regulatory risks.[4]

items.title: Purdue RCAC Expands AI Infrastructure in 2025 Review
items.summary: Purdue's Rosen Center for Advanced Computing highlighted 2025 achievements including next-gen GPUs, Anvil supercomputer upgrades with $5M NSF funding for national AI research, and top global benchmarks for AI hardware.[1]

items.title: Response to Nature Editorial on Autonomous 'AI Scientists'
items.summary: A critique of Nature's March 25, 2026, editorial argues that concepts like AI agents for hypothesis generation and experimentation were already discussed in prior works from 2024-2025, calling for updated governance.[5]

items.title: Purdue Develops Brain-Inspired AI Hardware for Efficient Autonomous Devices
items.summary: Purdue researchers created brain-mimicking AI hardware that reduces energy use, enabling real-time decision-making and adaptation in autonomous devices.[8]

items.title: EU Eurostat Launches Web Intelligence Hub Using AI for Job Data Extraction
items.summary: Eurostat introduced the Web Intelligence Hub, employing AI and machine learning to extract data from millions of job postings across 500 websites for standardized labor market analysis.[7]

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Island of Hearts FMV Game Launches on Steam
items.summary: GCL released Island of Hearts, a first-person FMV romantic adventure filmed in Phuket, Thailand, on Steam for $13.49 with a 10% launch discount. The game features seven Asian social influencers and includes dialogue choices and mini-games.

items.title: Xbox Partner Preview Showcases Major Third-Party Titles
items.summary: Xbox held its Partner Preview on March 26, 2026, featuring world premieres and gameplay reveals including Stranger Than Heaven from Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio, S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2 updates, and The Expanse: Osiris Reborn, with surprise Xbox Game Pass day-one additions announced.

items.title: Company of Heroes 3 Topaz Rhino Update Coming March 31
items.summary: The Company of Heroes 3 development team announced the upcoming 2.3.0 Topaz Rhino update scheduled for March 31st, with a deep dive discussion covering all changes and improvements.

items.title: Dice Tower West 2026 Highlights Most Checked Out Games
items.summary: The Dice Tower released a video reviewing the most checked out games from the Dice Tower West 2026 library, featuring Tom Vasel and Chris Yi discussing standout board games from the convention.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
